name: Volume-scaling operator
physical_motivation: Errors in elastic constants scale with volume errors. Classical potentials that over/underestimate equilibrium volumes propagate systematic bias to bulk modulus K.
expected_validity_domain: FCC metals where |dV/V| < 5%. Best for EAM/MEAM potentials.

name: Stiffness-ratio operator
physical_motivation: Ratio C11/C12 encodes longitudinal vs transverse stiffness balance. Deviations indicate incorrect angular dependence.
expected_validity_domain: Cubic FCC metals (Al,Cu,Ni,Ag,Au,Pt). Valid when C11,C12 > 0.

name: Stability-margin operator
physical_motivation: Distance from Born stability criteria. Measures proximity to elastic instability in the potential energy surface.
expected_validity_domain: All FCC metals. Values < 0.1 indicate high risk of unphysical behavior.
